industry: Geospatial software, computer-aided design software, and industrial internet of things (IIoT) solutions
description: Hexagon is a global leader in geospatial software, computer-aided design software, and industrial internet of things (IIoT) solutions. Hexagon's technology enables customers to make critical decisions at the speeds and in the precision needed for real-time applications.
vision_statement: To empower our customers to make data-driven decisions and improve their operations through innovative technology solutions.
mission_statement: To provide software solutions that drive productivity, quality and profitability for customers across industries.
sales_motion: Hexagon's sales motion involves a consultative approach, where our sales teams work closely with customers to understand their specific needs and provide tailored solutions.
exit_strategy_history: Hexagon has a history of successful acquisitions and divestitures, with a focus on strategic growth and expansion.
carbon_footprint: Hexagon has set a goal to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025, through the implementation of sustainable practices and energy-efficient solutions.
ethical_sourcing: Hexagon is committed to responsible and sustainable sourcing practices, with a focus on reducing the risk of human rights abuses and environmental degradation.
benchmark_vs_peers: Hexagon's financial performance is generally in line with industry benchmarks, with a revenue growth rate of 10% per annum over the past 5 years.

case_studies.title: Hexagon's Smart Factory Solution
case_studies.description: Hexagon's smart factory solution helped a leading manufacturer improve productivity by 25% and reduce waste by 30%.

case_studies.title: Hexagon's Geospatial Solution for Disaster Response
case_studies.description: Hexagon's geospatial solution helped emergency responders quickly and accurately assess damage and allocate resources after a natural disaster.

sustainability_csr: Hexagon has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility, with a focus on reducing its environmental impact and promoting social responsibility.
crisis_behavior: Hexagon has a well-established crisis management plan in place, with a focus on transparency, communication and stakeholder engagement.
